title: Core Loop Tightening & Wire Polish
summary: Push toward 90/100 by addressing the three areas stuck at 8: Core Loop, Juice, and Uniqueness. Add real-time gate count optimality indicator, smooth bezier wires for placed connections, and per-row micro-celebrations during simulation.

tasks.description: Real-time gate count + optimality indicator — show a persistent HUD element during gameplay that displays current gate count, optimal count, and projected star rating. Updates live as gates are placed/removed. Format: 'Gates: 2/2 ⭐⭐⭐' or 'Gates: 5/2 ⭐'. This tightens the core loop by giving instant optimization feedback before running.
acceptance_criteria: Gate count display visible during gameplay below the level description
Shows current count vs optimal count
Shows projected star rating (colored stars)
Updates in real-time when gates are added or removed
Hidden in sandbox mode
Shows for challenge mode too (without optimal reference)

tasks.description: Smooth bezier curved wires for placed connections — replace the current L-shaped Manhattan routing with smooth bezier curves for all placed wires. The wire should curve naturally from output pin to input pin. Keep shadow, glow, signal animation, and hit-testing working with the new curves.
acceptance_criteria: Placed wires render as smooth bezier curves instead of L-shaped segments
Wire shadow follows the curve
Active wire glow follows the curve during simulation
Signal pulse dots animate along the curve path
Wire hit-testing works with curved wires (clicking to select/delete)
Wire hover highlighting works
Selected wire highlight works
No visual regression on any existing features

tasks.description: Per-row micro-celebrations during simulation — when each truth table row passes, show a small green flash/checkmark particle burst on the truth table row. When a row fails, show a red shake. Makes the simulation sequence more visceral and juicy.
acceptance_criteria: Each passing row gets a brief green pulse/flash animation
Each failing row gets a brief red shake animation
Animations are quick (200-300ms) and don't slow down simulation
Works for all level types (campaign, challenge, daily)
No animation in sandbox mode

tasks.description: Wire color coding — give each wire a unique color from a palette (similar to real breadboard jumper wires) so complex circuits are easier to trace visually. Colors should be distinguishable and aesthetically pleasing. Active/simulation states still override with red/blue.
acceptance_criteria: Each new wire gets a distinct color from a rotating palette
Palette has 8+ distinguishable colors that work on the breadboard background
Colors persist for the wire's lifetime
During simulation, active wires still glow red, inactive still show blue
When not simulating, wires show their unique color
Selected wire still highlighted yellow
Wire shadow color matches the wire color (darkened)

testing_focus: Wire rendering looks smooth and natural with bezier curves
Gate count indicator updates correctly in real-time
Row animations fire correctly during simulation
Wire colors are distinguishable and aesthetically pleasing
No regressions in existing features (undo, hints, achievements, mobile)
Performance remains smooth with 10+ gates and many wires
rollback_criteria: If bezier wire changes break hit-testing or simulation animation, revert wire changes only
